holdings.infoBox: ADIV is an equity ETF with a total of 37 individual holdings. The top holdings are Largan Precision stock at 3.95%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 3.94%, BOC Hong Kong (Holdings) at 3.86%, Industrial and Commercial Bank of China at 3.44%, and Elite Material at 3.36%.

overview.description: The Guinness Atkinson Asia Pacific Dividend Builder ETF (ADIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively invests in Asia Pacific companies expected to have an increase in dividends over time. ADIV was launched on Mar 31, 2006 and is issued by Guinness Atkinson.
